name: Command Development
tagline: Reference guide for authoring Claude Code slash commands: frontmatter fields, dynamic arguments, file references, and bash execution.
verdict: Safe, thorough documentation skill with an explicit Troubleshooting section covering common failure modes, no security issues, and well-exampled patterns throughout. Weaknesses: the frontmatter `name` is 'Command Development' (not kebab-case), no out-of-scope statement separating it from the sibling Agent Development skill, an unusually long run-on.

highlights.summary: No exclusion/out-of-scope text anywhere; doesn't distinguish itself from the sibling Agent Development skill.
834-line SKILL.md still keeps many full pattern examples inline despite already delegating detail to references/*.md files.
Frontmatter `name: Command Development` uses spaces and capital letters, not kebab-case.
